pi_items.source: Task description specifies 'Search Key: GW-WDC'; iDempiere I_M_Warehouse.Value field documentation confirms field name and constraint that Value must be 'unique' and 'in the format required'

Task description specifies 'Create a new warehouse called 'West Distribution Center''; iDempiere I_M_Warehouse.Name field documentation confirms field is 'Alphanumeric identifier'; 25 characters is within the 60-character limit documented in iDempiere wiki

Task description specifies 'Locator 1: Search Key 'A01-01-01' (Aisle: A01, Bin: 01, Level: 01) -> Set as Default'; iDempiere I_M_Locator API documentation confirms X/Y/Z fields (String type) represent Aisle/Bin/Level respectively; iDempiere wiki documents IsDefault checkbox for default flag
Task description specifies 'Locator 2: Search Key 'A01-02-01' (Aisle: A01, Bin: 02, Level: 01) -> Not default'; coordinates and default flag verified against iDempiere schema
Task description specifies 'Locator 3: Search Key 'B01-01-01' (Aisle: B01, Bin: 01, Level: 01) -> Not default'; coordinates and default flag verified against iDempiere schema

privileged_info_summary: The create_warehouse task specifies creation of a warehouse with search key 'GW-WDC' named 'West Distribution Center' with three storage locators: A01-01-01 (Aisle A01, Bin 01, Level 01, set as default), A01-02-01 (Aisle A01, Bin 02, Level 01, not default), and B01-01-01 (Aisle B01, Bin 01, Level 01, not default). All metadata values match the task description exactly and use correct iDempiere field names (Value for warehouse search key, Name for warehouse name, X/Y/Z coordinates for locator aisles/bins/levels as String types). All constraints are satisfied (unique search keys, name within 60 characters, exactly 3 locators with one marked as default). This is synthetic data created by the agent during task execution; no such warehouse exists in the initial GardenWorld database state.
